recommendations.title: Marshall
recommendations.overview: Thurgood Marshall, the first African-American Supreme Court Justice, battles through one of his career-defining cases.

recommendations.title: Safety
recommendations.overview: The story of Ray-Ray McElrathbey, a freshman football player for Clemson University, who secretly raised his younger brother on campus after his home life became too unsteady.

recommendations.title: Boomerang

recommendations.title: House Party
recommendations.overview: Young Kid has been invited to a party at his friend Play's house. But after a fight at school, Kid's father grounds him. None the less, Kid sneaks out when his father falls asleep. But Kid doesn't know that three of the thugs at school have decided t

recommendations.title: Serving Sara
recommendations.overview: When Sara is served divorce papers while she is in New York, she is stunned. Not about to lose the fortune she amassed with her self-serving Texan husband, she makes an offer to her process server, Joe, that sets them off on a wild trip across the co

recommendations.title: Undisputed II: Last Man Standing
recommendations.overview: Heavyweight Champ George "Iceman" Chambers is sent to a Russian jail on trumped-up drug charges. In order to win his freedom he must fight against the jailhouse fighting champ Uri Boyka in a battle to the death. This time he is not fighting for a tit

recommendations.title: Candy Cane Lane
recommendations.overview: A man, determined to win the neighborhood's annual Christmas decorating contest, makes a pact with an elf to help him win. However, the elf casts a spell bringing the twelve days of Christmas to life, bringing chaos to the small, unsuspecting town.

recommendations.title: Somebody Up There Likes Me
recommendations.overview: The story of boxer Rocky Graziano's rise from juvenile delinquent to world champ.

recommendations.title: The Ladies Man

recommendations.title: Resurrecting the Champ
recommendations.overview: Up-and-coming sports reporter rescues a homeless man ("Champ") only to discover that he is, in fact, a boxing legend believed to have passed away. What begins as an opportunity to resurrect Champ's story and escape the shadow of his father's success
